# Model: llama3.2:3b

Here are the whitelist regex patterns to capture news about NATO:
\bnato\b
\nato\s*
\bonatlantic\s*nato
\bonato\s*alliance
\nato\s*summit
\nato\s*ministerial
\nato\s*defense
\nato\s*partnership
\nato\s*cooperation
\nato\s*expansion
\nato\s*budget
\nato\s*reform
Note: I've included variations such as "nato" with and without hyphens, and abbreviations like "USNATO" to capture a range of possible spellings.
